Calendar

Calendar used for date time formating. If not set, the default calendar for the locale will be used.

virtual esriCalendarEnum Calendar { get; set; }

Format

Format used to convert date time to string, i.e., yyyy/MM/dd.

virtual string Format { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromOADate(double, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int, out int)

Convert OADate to date time with the milliseconds preserved. Day of week is an integer between 0 and 6, where 0 indicates Sunday and 6 indicates Saturday.

virtual void FromOADate(double oadate, out int Year, out int Month, out int Day, out int Hour, out int Minute, out int Second, out int millisecond, out int DayOfWeek)

Parameters

oadate double
Year int
Month int
Day int
Hour int
Minute int
Second int
millisecond int
DayOfWeek int

Locale

Locale used for date time formating, i.e., en-US, zh-CN, ja-JP. If not set, the user default locale will be used.

virtual string Locale { get; set; }

Returns

string
